The HTML Maze
by kyrylo
◉ frozen archive

level 3 · 8,0

Sepulchral Event horizon

Floors vibrate from below.
Architecture for vaster entities.
Whispers of roused Old Ones.
R'lyeh artifacts plague source.

Compass

N S E W
Go North Go South Go East Go West Go Up Go Down

Left click to draw ✏️, right click to erase 🧽
Your marks stay in this tab only and vanish when you leave.

Writings on the Wall

This wall is sealed. Nothing new can be saved.

  • NORTH
  • SESWSESEESWWSWSSSENNEESSEENNWNNESEEEESSUNNWNENWWWWWNENNEEENWWWNEEEESUNW
  • this way
  • Give a monkey a gun and he is free
  • south goes to UP DOWN eventually
  • West leads only to dead ends
  • East goes back to the stairs DOWN.

The HTML Maze was built in July 2025 and frozen on 20 July 2026.

by kyrylo ~ x · bsky · mastodon
